Petition To Terminate The Probate Proceedings Due To The Insolvency Of The Estate, Request To Extinguish Bond And Request To Discharge Administrator
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Terminate The Probate Proceedings Due To The Insolvency Of The Estate, Request To Extinguish Bond And Request To Discharge Administrator
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Feb-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for and with Carol Redd (Petitioner). James Bridgman for and with Deborah Caldwell (Cross-Petitioner).

The Court ruled that the Mother of the Decedent has priorty. The Court granted Ms. Redd's Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $10,000.00. Ms. Caldwell's Petition for Letters of Administration was denied.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
